title: A Comprehensive Bioinformatic Analysis of SLC52A3 as a Prognostic Biomarker and Potential Therapeutic Target in Gynecological Cancers.
snippet: The gene solute carrier family 52 member 3 (SLC52A3) encodes riboflavin transporter-3, a transmembrane protein essential for riboflavin absorption. Emerging evidence suggests that metabolic transporters may play a role in tumor biology. This study aimed to investigate the expression patterns, prognostic significance, genetic alterations, and functional asso...
